---
title: 'Devin N Wolfe (05/1983 - 10/20/2009)'
date: '2017-12-05T09:11:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7808362483042118667'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/devin-n-wolfe-051983-2010.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1927815-1089960810419-7030-n-aba5f96e9a8e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="604" data-original-width="453" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1927815-1089960810419-7030-n-2fde2216ca92.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1927815-1089960890421-7645-n-afc2eb8d1551.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="453" data-original-width="604" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1927815-1089960890421-7645-n-97c145294d9a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1934960-1126924654492-6515767-n-b10818a5519f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="287" data-original-width="202" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1934960-1126924654492-6515767-n-b10818a5519f.jpg" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
